name: lzr1-tw-team
description: Technical writing specialists for functional and API documentation. 3 specialized agents (functional-writer, api-writer, docs-reviewer) and 6 documentation skills covelzr1 voice/tone, structure, API field descriptions, and quality review. Enforces clear, consistent documentation standards.

interface.shortDescription: Technical writing specialists for functional guides and API reference
interface.longDescription: Documentation specialists for the lzr1 docs surface: a functional-writer for guides, tutorials, and conceptual content; an api-writer for endpoint reference and schemas; a docs-reviewer for voice, tone, structure, and accuracy. Skills enforce consistent voice/tone, structure, and quality across all lzr1 documentation.
defaultPrompt: Write a guide for this feature using lzr1:write-guide.
Review this API documentation for voice and accuracy.
